settings.html: <style>.ka-embed{--ka-orange:#e8651a;--ka-text:#1a1a1a;--ka-muted:#6b7280;--ka-bg:#f9f9f9;--ka-radius:24px;--ka-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.08);font-family:inherit;color:var(--ka-text)}.ka-embed *{box-sizing:border-box}.ka-embed-section{width:min(1120px,calc(100% - 40px));margin:0 auto;padding:88px 0}.ka-embed-hero{max-width:760px;text-align:center;padding-top:72px;padding-bottom:28px}.ka-embed h1,.ka-embed h2,.ka-embed h3,.ka-embed p{margin:0}.ka-embed-hero h1{font-size:clamp(2.4rem,6vw,4.8rem);line-height:1.02;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.04em}.ka-embed-accent{color:var(--ka-orange)}.ka-embed-hero p,.ka-embed-copy{color:var(--ka-muted);line-height:1.8}.ka-embed-hero p{max-width:640px;margin:18px auto 0}.ka-embed-proof{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-top:24px;padding:12px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(232,101,26,.12);border-radius:999px;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(232,101,26,.08)}.ka-embed-avatars{display:flex}.ka-embed-avatar{width:38px;height:38px;margin-left:-9px;border-radius:999px;border:2px solid #fff;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#4b5563;background:#f3f4f6}.ka-embed-avatar:first-child{margin-left:0}.ka-embed-a1{background:#f4c5a3}.ka-embed-a2{background:#c3daf4}.ka-embed-a3{background:#c4f4c3}.ka-embed-stars{color:var(--ka-orange);letter-spacing:.08em}.ka-embed-rating{text-align:left}.ka-embed-rating p{margin-top:4px;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--ka-muted)}.ka-embed-btn{display:inline-block;margin-top:24px;padding:15px 28px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--ka-orange);color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 16px 30px rgba(232,101,26,.18)}.ka-embed-hero-image img{width:100%;border-radius:28px;aspect-ratio:16/10;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:var(--ka-shadow)}.ka-embed-surface{background:var(--ka-bg);border-radius:36px;padding-left:32px;padding-right:32px}.ka-embed-label{text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.16em;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--ka-muted);font-weight:700}.ka-embed-title{max-width:720px;margin:10px auto 0;text-align:center;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.035em;font-weight:800}.ka-embed-copy{max-width:620px;margin:14px auto 0;text-align:center}.ka-embed-grid{display:grid;gap:22px;margin-top:36px}.ka-embed-grid-3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))}.ka-embed-grid-2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.ka-embed-card,.ka-embed-price-card,.ka-embed-testimonial{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;box-shadow:0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}.ka-embed-card{padding:24px}.ka-embed-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:14px;background:#fff3ec;color:var(--ka-orange);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem}.ka-embed-card h3{margin-top:12px;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700}.ka-embed-card p{margin-top:8px;color:var(--ka-muted);line-height:1.7}.ka-embed-list{margin:14px 0 0;padding:0;list-style:none;display:grid;gap:10px}.ka-embed-list li{position:relative;padding-left:18px;color:var(--ka-muted);line-height:1.65}.ka-embed-list li:before{content:'';position:absolute;top:11px;left:0;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--ka-orange)}.ka-embed-price-card{overflow:hidden}.ka-embed-price-card img{width:100%;height:220px;object-fit:cover}.ka-embed-price-content{padding:18px 22px 24px}.ka-embed-price-content h3{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700}.ka-embed-price-content p{margin-top:8px;color:var(--ka-muted);line-height:1.7}.ka-embed-price{margin-top:12px;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800}.ka-embed-testimonial{padding:26px;background:var(--ka-bg)}.ka-embed-quote{margin-top:14px;line-height:1.8}.ka-embed-person{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:18px}.ka-embed-person strong{display:block}.ka-embed-person span{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:var(--ka-muted);font-size:.82rem}.ka-embed-cta{padding:70px 32px;border-radius:32px;background:var(--ka-orange);color:#fff;text-align:center}.ka-embed-cta h2{font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);font-weight:800}.ka-embed-cta p{max-width:560px;margin:12px auto 0;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(255,255,255,.92)}.ka-embed-cta .ka-embed-btn{background:#fff;color:var(--ka-orange);box-shadow:none}@media(max-width:1024px){.ka-embed-grid-3{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}}@media(max-width:767px){.ka-embed-section{width:min(100%,calc(100% - 24px));padding:60px 0}.ka-embed-surface,.ka-embed-cta{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px}.ka-embed-proof{flex-direction:column;border-radius:24px}.ka-embed-rating{text-align:center}.ka-embed-grid-2,.ka-embed-grid-3{grid-template-columns:1fr}}</style>
